title: What happens if the guard is put in the wrong place
differs: Same as s2 (Final flag off on the dev Route), but the guard is in the wrong place — the dev Route's filter, where it can never match, so dev receives nothing.
description: Mis-scoped guard: clone==true added to the WG dev route FILTER itself. The field only exists on clones created BY this route, so the filter can never match — dev gets zero events.
